ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., APPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock, accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock price was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buy_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buy order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being bought */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock being bought */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the stock */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of buy order (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., active, filled, canceled) */,
  "limit_price" TEXT /* Limit price for limit orders */,
  "stop_price" TEXT /* Stop price for stop-loss orders */,
  "order_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buy_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buy_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sell_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sell order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock being sold */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the stock */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of sell order (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., active, filled, canceled) */,
  "limit_price" TEXT /* Limit price for limit orders */,
  "stop_price" TEXT /* Stop price for stop-loss orders */,
  "order_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sell_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sell_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy or sell) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., RSI, Bollinger Bands) */,
  "indicator_value" TEXT /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* Period used for the indicator calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the indicator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "news_url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the news article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sp" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sp entry */,
  "sp" INTEGER /* sp value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sp_date" TEXT /* Date when the sp value was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sp value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sp_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buy_average" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buy average entry */,
  "buy_average" TEXT /* Buy average value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "average_date" TEXT /* Date when the buy average was calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the buy average was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buy_average_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buy_quantity" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buy quantity entry */,
  "buy_quantity" INTEGER /* Buy quantity value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity_date" TEXT /* Date when the buy quantity was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the buy quantity was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buy_quantity_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sell_average" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sell average entry */,
  "sell_average" TEXT /* Sell average value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "average_date" TEXT /* Date when the sell average was calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sell average was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sell_average_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sell_quantity" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sell quantity entry */,
  "sell_quantity" INTEGER /* Sell quantity value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity_date" TEXT /* Date when the sell quantity was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sell quantity was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sell_quantity_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_average" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overall average entry */,
  "overall_average" TEXT /* Overall average value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "average_date" TEXT /* Date when the overall average was calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the overall average was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_average_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_quantity" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overall quantity entry */,
  "overall_quantity" INTEGER /* Overall quantity value */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity_date" TEXT /* Date when the overall quantity was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the overall quantity was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_quantity_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
